title: Biogas and e-SAF Business Joint Venture Established with Denmark's Skovgaard Energy
content: Sumitomo Corporation has established a joint venture North Sky A/S with Skovgaard Energy , a company engaged in the development of renewable energy to produce biogas and Power to X (*1) business such as e-SAF (*2). The new company aims to produce around 40 million NmÂ³ (*3) of biogas â€“ equivalent to the annual gas consumption of about 20,000 Danish households. It will also expand SE's existing biogas production sites across Denmark. Further, leveraging knowledge gained from the biogas business, the joint venture will develop other bioenergy sources, including e-SAF, a sustainable aviation fuel.
author: Analysts Account
